description: Cast enrichment: cast_style (as_cast/c_style/static_cast/dynamic_cast/reinterpret_cast), cast_target_type, cast_safety (safe/moderate/unsafe). Grounded on forgeql-pub.frozen — Rust 'as' casts plus C/C++ fixture casts.

cases.name: as_cast_rust
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/storage/columnar/segment_reader.rs' WHERE fql_kind='cast' WHERE cast_style='as_cast' ORDER BY line ASC LIMIT 100

cases.name: c_style_cast_count
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'tests/fixtures/enrichment_patterns.cpp' WHERE fql_kind='cast' WHERE cast_style='c_style' LIMIT 100

cases.name: static_cast_global
cases.fql: FIND symbols WHERE fql_kind='cast' WHERE cast_style='static_cast' LIMIT 100

cases.name: cast_safety_safe
cases.fql: FIND symbols WHERE fql_kind='cast' WHERE cast_safety='safe' ORDER BY line ASC LIMIT 10

cases.name: cast_safety_unsafe_global
cases.fql: FIND symbols WHERE fql_kind='cast' WHERE cast_safety='unsafe' LIMIT 100

cases.name: cast_target_type_u32
cases.fql: FIND symbols WHERE fql_kind='cast' WHERE cast_target_type='u32' LIMIT 100

cases.name: reinterpret_cast_global
cases.fql: FIND symbols WHERE fql_kind='cast' WHERE cast_style='reinterpret_cast' LIMIT 100

cases.name: negative_no_c_style_in_rust
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/storage/columnar/segment_reader.rs' WHERE fql_kind='cast' WHERE cast_style='c_style' LIMIT 5
